name: definition
details:
{"depends_on": ["public.trips"], "check_option": "NONE", "is_updatable": "NO", "definition_length": 703, "definition_preview": " SELECT driver_id,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE ((status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS completed_trips,
    COALESCE(sum(price) FILTER (WHERE ((status)::text = 'completed'::text)), (0)::numeric) AS total_earnings,
    COALESCE(avg(price) FILTER (WHERE ((status)::text = 'completed'::text)), (0)::numeric) AS avg_price,
    COALESCE(sum(price) FILTER (WHERE (((status)::text = 'completed'::text) AND (created_at >= (now() - '7 days'::interval)))), (0)::numeric) AS earnings_7d,
    COALESCE(sum(price)", "is_insertable_into": "NO"}

name: definition
details:
{"depends_on": ["public.trips"], "check_option": "NONE", "is_updatable": "NO", "definition_length": 283, "definition_preview": " SELECT driver_id,
    count(*) AS total_completed_trips,
    COALESCE(sum(price), (0)::numeric) AS total_earnings,
    COALESCE(avg(price), (0)::numeric) AS avg_trip_price
   FROM trips
  WHERE (((status)::text = 'completed'::text) AND (driver_id IS NOT NULL))
  GROUP BY driver_id;", "is_insertable_into": "NO"}
